title: Line 35000 – Total federal non-refundable tax credits - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 35000 – Total federal non-refundable tax credits
Line 35000 of the return is the total of your federal non-refundable tax credits.
Remember to claim the corresponding provincial or territorial non-refundable tax credits that you may be entitled to on your provincial or territorial Form 428 .
